overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit night market. The player moves past food stalls and vendors in a narrow cyberpunk alleyway, encountering various NPCs including a food vendor, customers, and pedestrians in a dystopian urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk market alley with food stalls

events.description: white refrigerator temporarily blocks the view at the start of the alley
moving from refrigerator area into the main market corridor with stalls

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the narrow alley, passing a large white refrigerator and approaching a food stall

notable_agents.action: woman in denim shorts standing at the food stall counter, facing the vendor

entered.detail: tall white commercial refrigerator in the narrow alley
wooden food stall with warm overhead lighting and striped awning
rusted corrugated metal roofing over the market stalls
pink neon signage on building facade visible through the alley

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, dominated by a large white refrigerator blocking the path. As the camera moves forward, it reveals a food stall on the right with warm lighting where a woman stands ordering food. Metal support beams and corrugated metal roofing create an enclosed industrial atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with display shelves

events.description: green neon sign illuminates the left wall with cyan light
slowing down as approaching the serving counter area

agents.ego_description: moving deeper into the market past wooden shelves displaying porcelain items, approaching a serving counter

notable_agents.action: man wearing distinctive yellow boots and white cap standing at the counter

entered.detail: wooden shelving unit with white porcelain bowls and decorative items
illuminated green neon sign reading DRINK on the left wall
long metal serving counter with various food containers and jars
large ceramic jars and containers on the counter surface

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered market, the camera passes wooden shelves filled with porcelain items on the left. A bright green neon sign illuminates the wall while the path leads to a serving counter lined with ceramic jars. A man in distinctive yellow boots stands waiting at the counter as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: food service counter area with customers

events.description: man takes a drink from the counter and sips from the cup
moving past the counter into a more open market area

agents.ego_description: standing at the counter observing the interaction between customer and vendor, then moving past into the open area

notable_agents.action: man in gray sweater drinking from a cup at the counter
vendor behind the counter attending to customers

entered.detail: bright fluorescent tube lights hanging from the ceiling
red neon signage on distant buildings visible through the market
thick metal support beams with cross-bracing

segments.scene_description: At the food counter, a man in a gray sweater takes a drink while the vendor works behind the counter. Bright fluorescent lights illuminate the area as the camera moves past, revealing red neon signs on distant buildings. The space transitions from narrow corridor to a more open market area with metal support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk market square with multiple stalls

events.description: market space opens up from narrow corridor to wider plaza area
child runs past the camera and falls to the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the open market area, observing various NPCs and the surrounding stalls

notable_agents.action: woman with purple hair and cybernetic arm standing in the market
child in blue outfit running through the market then falling to the ground

entered.detail: large metal archway with red lights marking the market entrance
canopy over food stall with various items displayed
wooden crates and boxes stacked near the wall

segments.scene_description: The market opens into a wider plaza area with a large metal arch structure ahead. A woman with purple hair and a cybernetic arm stands prominently on the right while a child runs through the space and falls. Various market stalls with canopies line the area, and the wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cramped, industrial alleyway that gradually opens into a wide, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins in a narrow corridor dominated by a large white refrigerator and a warm-lit food stall tucked under corrugated metal roofing. As the camera pushes deeper into the covered market, the environment shifts past wooden shelves of porcelain and a bright green neon sign toward a serving counter where a man in yellow boots waits. The scene then expands as the camera moves past a vendor and a man in a gray sweater, transitioning from the tight corridor into a more open space marked by metal support pillars and distant red neon signs. Finally, the path opens fully into a wider plaza under a large metal arch, where wet asphalt reflects the surrounding lights as a purple-haired woman stands near market stalls and a child runs through the square.
